form.formComment: Has finished in the money at his last three runs, the latest at long odds when second (22.93) at Warragul. Draws the cherry this time. Must be included.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th on April 3 over 400m at Warragul behind Akina Rocky beaten 11 lengths (23.32) in a Grade 5. Expected to go very well.

form.formComment: Could only manage sixth last time but had been in the money the two starts prior, most recently when a narrow third (23.43) over 400m at Warragul. Drawn a inside box but will need a little luck to feature.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (19.48) in a Grade 5, finishing a 3.5 lengths fifth. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Has ability and should feature.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 4th over 390m at Shepparton beaten 5.5 lengths (22.53) behind Our Regards in a Grade 4 on April 6. Placed two back at Shepparton. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Comes to this track for the first time. Comes off an average run last start over 352m at Q Lakeside when fifth behind Swift Cannon (20.01) in Grade 5. Not going well enough. Needs to lift.
